trust.strip.years_body: Designing Southeast Asia routes for Western travelers.
how.heading: How planning with AsiaTravelPlan works
how.card1.title: 1. Free discovery call
how.card1.body: We align on destination mix, travel pace, comfort level, and budget.
how.card2.title: 2. 24h response time
how.card2.body: You will receive feedback for your trip within 24 hours.
how.card3.title: 3. Refine and confirm
how.card3.body: We tune hotels, activities, and transport until the plan fits you.
how.card4.title: 4. Travel with support
how.card4.body: Our local team helps before and during your trip, including rerouting if needed.
why.heading: Why travelers choose AsiaTravelPlan
why.item1: Tailored with precision: every hotel, transfer, guide, and pace is refined around how you want to travel.
why.item2: Transparent by design: your quote is shaped with clarity, so you understand the value behind every choice.
why.item3: Local expertise throughout: when plans need to shift, our team on the ground handles the details seamlessly.
why.item4: Comfort without compromise: journeys are crafted for travelers who value quality, ease, and thoughtful pacing.
why.caption: Our local experts help you during your journey in Vietnam.
trust.heading: About Us
trust.metric1.label: offer-to-booking satisfaction
trust.metric2.label: You will have your initial route offer within 24 hours
trust.metric3.label: From planning to on-trip support
trust.review1.quote: "Every transfer and hotel handoff was smooth. We felt looked after the whole way."
trust.review1.author: Anna & James, UK
trust.review2.quote: "The quote was the clearest we got from any agency. No hidden surprises later."
trust.review2.author: Claire, Australia
trust.review3.quote: "When weather changed in central Vietnam, they rerouted our days quickly and calmly."
trust.review3.author: Ben, Canada
faq.heading: Frequently asked questions
faq.q1: Is $500 per week enough for a comfortable trip?
faq.a1: Usually yes for smart-comfort planning, depending on season, route complexity, and hotel tier.
faq.q2: Private or group travel: what is better?
faq.a2: Private travel works best for flexibility and comfort. Group tours can reduce cost but with less control.
faq.q3: How quickly do you send itinerary options?
faq.a3: Our standard is 48 to 72 hours after your discovery call.
faq.q4: Can we combine all four countries in one route?
faq.a4: Yes. We can design multi-country routes with realistic pacing and clear transfer planning.
faq.q5: What if weather disrupts our plan?
faq.a5: We provide practical alternatives and rerouting support using our local partner network.
faq.q6: Do you support visa and entry guidance?
faq.a6: Yes. We provide up-to-date guidance for entry requirements and practical prep checklists.
contact.heading: Book your free discovery call
contact.body: Tell us your destination ideas and budget. We will reply with clear options and next steps.
contact.item1: Local experts across Vietnam, Thailand, Cambodia, and Laos.
contact.item2: Clear inclusions and exclusions before booking.
contact.item3: Fast first offer in 48 to 72 hours.
contact.item4: On-trip support if plans need to change.
contact.response_time: Response within 24 hours on email or WhatsApp.
contact.review1.quote: "We got a tailored route fast, and the quote was easy to understand."
contact.review1.author: Emily, USA
contact.review2.quote: "Great local support and thoughtful pacing for our family."
contact.review2.author: Oliver, UK
contact.review3.quote: "They helped us combine Vietnam and Laos without travel-day stress."

contact.caption: Real itinerary support from before departure to your return flight.

traveler_details.page_meta_description: Fill in your traveler details for AsiaTravelPlan.
traveler_details.intro: This information helps us prepare your journey smoothly. If you prefer, you can also provide it later, at the beginning of your trip. The link to this page expires in 24 hours to protect your privacy.
traveler_details.submit: Send traveler details to Asia Travel Plan
traveler_details.consent_privacy_policy_: Agreement to store and use traveler data for trip operations.
traveler_details.consent_profiling_hint: Permission to personalize offers based on traveler preferences.
traveler_details.consent_marketing_email: Permission to send future offers and updates by email.
traveler_details.consent_marketing_whats: Permission to send future offers and updates via WhatsApp.
traveler_details.consent_required_notice: Privacy policy and Personalization are required to continue.
traveler_details.could_not_upload_docume: Could not upload the document image.
traveler_details.traveler_details_not_lo: Traveler details could not be loaded.
traveler_details.traveler_date_of_birth_: Traveler date of birth must use YYYY-MM-DD.
traveler_details.traveler_document_issue: Traveler travel document issue date must use YYYY-MM-DD.
traveler_details.traveler_document_expir: Traveler travel document expiry date must use YYYY-MM-DD.
